name: explain_stream
description: Stream a clear explanation of a concept, code snippet, or term. Returns plain text.

topic.description: The concept, code snippet, or term to explain.

context.description: Optional surrounding context (e.g. the file or system the code belongs to, or the domain the term is used in).

depth.description: Explanation depth: 'brief' (2-3 sentences), 'standard' (1-2 paragraphs), 'detailed' (full breakdown with examples). Default: 'standard'.

language.description: Output language. If omitted, matches the language of the topic.

errors.message: Input does not conform to the schema.
